---
name: Commit
description: This prompt is designed to create a clean and concise commit message based on the changes made in the codebase and the previous commits structure. It helps maintain a consistent commit history and improves readability for other developers.
---
Generate a commit message that accurately describes the changes made in the codebase, following the structure of previous commits for consistency. The message should be concise, clear, and informative, providing enough context for other developers to understand the purpose of the changes without needing to review the code in detail.
